zh.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh.Scole, South Norfolk District, Norfolk,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯可爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset是Sir John Blennerhassett和Joan Skelton的兒子，於1408年出生在英國諾福爾可福倫。他於大約1423年與Johanna Joan de Lowdham在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年11月8日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯可爾。

zh-hans.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh-hans.Scole, South Norfolk District, Norfolk,: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset是Sir John Blennerhassett和Joan Skelton的儿子，于1408年出生在英国諾福爾可福倫。他于大约1423年与Johanna Joan de Lowdham在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年11月8日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset was born in 1408, in Frenze, Norfolk, England as the son of Sir John Blennerhassett and Joan Skelton. He married Johanna Joan de Lowdham about 1423, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Scole, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset est né en 1408, à Frenze, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Sir John Blennerhassett et Joan Skelton. Il a épousé Johanna Joan de Lowdham environ 1423, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Scole, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset wurde 1408 in Frenze, Norfolk, England, als Sohn von Sir John Blennerhassett und Joan Skelton geboren. Er hat um 1423 in England Johanna Joan de Lowdham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1475 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scole, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset è nato il nel 1408 nel Frenze, Norfolk, England come figlio di Sir John Blennerhassett e Joan Skelton. Lui sposato Johanna Joan de Lowdham circa 1423, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Scole, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Frenze, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクフレンズ
ja.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクアットレボロウ
ja.Scole, South Norfolk District, Norfolk,: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスコール
ja.Great Stanton Manor, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhassetは1408年にイギリスノーフォルクフレンズでSir John BlennerhassettとJoan Skeltonの息子として生まれた。約1423年にイギリスでJohanna Joan de Lowdhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年11月8日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスコールにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset(은)는 1408년 영국 노르폴크 프렌즈에서 Sir John Blennerhassett(와)과 Joan Skelton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1423년 영국에서 Johanna Joan de Lowdham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 11월 8일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스콜에 묻혔다.

mn.Scole, South Norfolk District, Norfolk,: Scole, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset nasceu em 1408, em Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de Sir John Blennerhassett e Joan Skelton. Ele casou-se com Johanna Joan de Lowdham aproximadamente 1423, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1475, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Scole, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset родился в 1408 г. в местности френз, норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir John Blennerhassett и Joan Skelton. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Joan de Lowdham около 1423 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности скол, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Blennerhasset nació en 1408, en Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir John Blennerhassett y Joan Skelton. Se casó con Johanna Joan de Lowdham aproximadamente 1423, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Scole, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
